channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-03-21)

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Plea Tech|Plea Tech is offering Pure Amber spectral shaping plugin for Win as a free download. If the discount doesn’t apply automatically, use the code: VI-CONTROL.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Plea Tech - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [HOT] u-he|Best Service Exclusive Deals – 44% off on U-He Hive 2 virtual synth plugin.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Evenant|Evenant is offering Evenant Engine virtual instrument for Kontakt (full version) as a free download.?NEW
